zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Beauchamp 3rd Baron Beauchamp of Bletsoe於1381年8月1日出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾時，他的父親Roger de Beauchamp18歲，母親Mary17歲。他於1406年1月23日之前與Lady Margaret De Holand, Baroness Beauchamp結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1412年4月13日在英國米德萊可倫敦享年30歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可克萊爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Beauchamp 3rd Baron Beauchamp of Bletsoe于1381年8月1日出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾时，他的父亲Roger de Beauchamp18岁，母亲Mary17岁。他于1406年1月23日之前与Lady Margaret De Holand, Baroness Beauchamp结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1412年4月13日在英国米德萊可倫敦享年30岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可克萊爾。

nameMeanings.name: Beauchamp
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Beecham
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of   Beauchamp  , reflecting the normal English pronunciation.

variants.name: Beachem
meanings: English (Somerset and Gloucestershire): variant of   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Bagent
meanings: possibly a colloquial pronunciation of Beauchamp or Beecham . Old French Beau- often appears as Be(e)- in English surnames. The -ch- has been voiced and excrescent -t has been added.

perhaps an Anglicized form of a French or Flemish surname such as Beaujean and Bejean, from Old French bel Jehan ‘handsome John’ + excrescent -t. It could have been introduced to England in the 15th or 16th century by Flemish migrants.

variants.name: Beacham
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Campbell
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Bushaw
meanings: Americanized form of French   Beauchamp   and   Bouchard  .

variants.name: Beacom
meanings: English (Somerset) and Irish (Fermanagh): of Norman origin, a variant of   Beauchamp  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Beauchamp 3rd Baron Beauchamp of Bletsoe was born on 1 August 1381, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Roger de Beauchamp, was 18 and his mother, Mary, was 17. He married Lady Margaret De Holand, Baroness Beauchamp before 23 January 1406. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 13 April 1412, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 30, and was buried in Clare, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Beauchamp 3rd Baron Beauchamp of Bletsoe est né le 1 août 1381, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger de Beauchamp, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Mary, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret De Holand, Baroness Beauchamp avant 23 janvier 1406. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 13 avril 1412, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterré à Clare, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Beauchamp 3rd Baron Beauchamp of Bletsoe am 1. August 1381 in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Beauchamp 18 und seine Mutter Mary 17. Er hat vor 23. Januar 1406 Lady Margaret De Holand, Baroness Beauchamp geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 13. April 1412 im Alter von 30 Jahren in London, Middlesex, England und wurde in Clare, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Beauchamp 3rd Baron Beauchamp of Bletsoe è nato il il 1 agosto 1381 nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Roger de Beauchamp, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Mary, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Lady Margaret De Holand, Baroness Beauchamp prima del 23 gennaio 1406. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 13 aprile 1412, nel London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 30 anni, e fu sepolto a Clare, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Beauchamp 3rd Baron Beauchamp of Bletsoeが1381年8月1日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Roger de Beauchampは18歳，母Maryは17歳であった。1406年1月23日以前にLady Margaret De Holand, Baroness Beauchampと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1412年4月13日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで30歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルククラーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Beauchamp 3rd Baron Beauchamp of Bletsoe(이)가 1381년 8월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Beauchamp(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1406년 1월 23일 이전 Lady Margaret De Holand, Baroness Beauchamp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1412년 4월 13일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 클래르에 묻혔다.

pt.1 August 1381–13 April 1412: 1 de agosto de 1381–13 de abril de 1412
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Beauchamp 3rd Baron Beauchamp of Bletsoe nasceu em 1 de agosto de 1381, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roger de Beauchamp, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Mary, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret De Holand, Baroness Beauchamp antes 23 de janeiro de 1406. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 13 de abril de 1412, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 30 anos, e foi sepultado em Clare, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Beauchamp 3rd Baron Beauchamp of Bletsoe родился 1 августа 1381 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roger de Beauchamp было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret De Holand, Baroness Beauchamp перед 23 январь 1406 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 13 апреля 1412 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 30 лет и был похоронен в местности клар, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.1 August 1381–13 April 1412: 1 de agosto de 1381–13 de abril de 1412
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Beauchamp 3rd Baron Beauchamp of Bletsoe nació el 1 de agosto de 1381, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Roger de Beauchamp, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Mary, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Lady Margaret De Holand, Baroness Beauchamp antes de 23 de enero de 1406. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 13 de abril de 1412, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 30 años, y fue sepultado en Clare, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
